chain_edges.notes: AI-Infra CVE sub-catalog precedent feeds the agent-skills threat sub-matrix as a parallel regulatory primitive.
OWASP MCP Top 10 + MCP Gateway pattern provides the protocol-governance template that agent-skills marketplace gating mirrors.
AGI-clause unwind converts metaphysical AGI into financial-instrument primitive, directly enabling the audited AI-economics disclosure regime.
Apr 29-30 Mag 7 prints reset AI-capex ROI narrative, feeding the SEC + analyst pressure for audited revenue + WAU disclosure.
Per-token-margin-gated capex disclosure thesis is the cloud-side mechanism the focal prediction generalizes into a full disclosure rewrite.
Per-token-margin-gated capex disclosure creates the economic forcing function for hyperscalers to adopt compressed-cache tiers as a pricing lever.
AI-capex ROI reset and per-token-margin floor push hyperscalers to tier per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers.
1M-context-as-default expands memory-bandwidth-bound workload share, making KV-cache compression flags a required deployment knob.
KV-cache-dtype as deployment knob feeds into inference-tuned SKU $/query competition since compressed cache is an inference-side lever.

relations.notes: Both target H2/Q3 2026 NIST/CISA-led catalog primitives over AI infra; agent-skills sub-matrix vs AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog.
Sibling regulatory-primitive predictions: agent-skills threat sub-matrix vs inference-server + agentic-CI CVE sub-catalog.
Both crystallize a new AI-attack-surface category into formal cataloging by Q3/H2 2026; skills marketplace vs inference-runtime SBOM.
Protocol-level governance siblings: OWASP MCP Top 10 + Gateway parallels skills threat sub-matrix + signed-provenance gate.
Both extend AI-security baselines to upstream surfaces: third-party-vendor boundary vs skill marketplace publish gate.
Agent-governance siblings: skill marketplace signing/provenance vs Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents Act.
Focal requires Big-3 cloud per-token-margin 10-Q footnote, which entails the per-token-margin-gated capex disclosure of 140440d9.
Focal Big-3 per-token-margin 10-Q footnote subsumes the per-token-margin floor tiering predicted by 3a5f7303.
Both descend from Apr 27 AGI-clause unwind but address different surfaces: contract templates vs disclosure cadence.
Both respond to Apr 28 Mag-7 capex tape; per-token-margin gating and KV-cache compression are complementary cost-control levers.
Both predict Q3-Q4 2026 hyperscaler pricing-discipline shifts driven by the same AI-capex ROI reset.
Long-context defaults and KV-cache compression are independent facets of the same memory-bandwidth-bound inference theme.
27B Dense + 1M context open-weight floor and KV-cache-dtype flag both shape the H2 2026 enterprise inference stack.
Inference-tuned SKUs with native FP4/MXFP4 and KV-cache-dtype flags are parallel inference-side $/query optimizations.
Both compress per-token cost; consumer-GPU coding agents and KV-cache compression are independent inference-cost levers.
